news.title: How AI guardrails are impeding the work of offensive cybersecurity researchers
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] We spoke with several cybersecurity researchers, who look for unknown vulnerabilities and develop tools to exploit them, about how OpenAI’s and Anthropic’s guardrails affect their work.

news.description: [INTERNATIONAL BUSINESS TIMES] Amazon founder Jeff Bezos is personally overseeing a redesign of Prime Video that aims to place artificial intelligence at the center of one of the company's most recognizable consumer products.
